title: DOITOOL Small Milk Pot with Wood Handle 7 Inch Stainless Steel Saucepan for Soup Noodles Baby Food Cooking Hanging Ring for Easy Storage
features: Core Functionality: This small milk pot with a practical wooden handle is designed for versatile kitchen use, ideal for heating milk, cooking noodles, making soup, sauces, and preparing baby food, meeting various cooking needs with ease
Material: Made of premium stainless steel without chemical coatings, this milk pot offers safe, use without the risk of coating peeling at high temperatures, ensuring reliable kitchen cookware

Ergonomic Design: Equipped with a sturdy wooden handle firmly riveted for a secure and comfortable grip, the pot allows safe handling even when cooking hot liquids, enhancing user convenience and safety

Efficient Cooking Features: the saucepan includes pouring lips on both sides to prevent spillage and a built-in scale line to easily measure liquids, helping to improve cooking accuracy and efficiency in everyday use

Convenient Storage and Compatibility: Featuring a hanging ring for space-saving storage, this small cooking pot with wood handle is compatible with gas stoves and induction cookers, and easy to clean for everyday kitchen use
description: Product Description DOITOOL Stainless Steel Yukihira Pan Traditional Japanese Saucepan with Wood Handle Milk Sauce Pan for Ramen Tempura Milk 18cm
